transit.description: Virtual dependency task that creates a dependency chain without executing any script. This enables parallel task execution across packages while ensuring correct cache invalidation when dependency source files change. Works by establishing relationships in the dependency graph without matching any actual package.json script.

dev.description: Start development server with hot reload

dev:mock.description: Start development server with mocked (MSW) API responses

dev:local.description: Start development server with API proxied to local backend (localhost:8081)

format.description: Format code with Prettier and ESLint across all packages

lint.description: Run all linting checks (ESLint, Prettier, TypeScript, package.json)

test.description: Run test suites across all packages

clean.description: Remove build artifacts and cached files
